visual_description: A medium shot captures two men in dark suits sitting opposite each other at a table in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, who has a mustache and is smoking, gestures with his hand as he speaks. The man on the right, wearing glasses, listens intently. A small, light-colored ashtray sits on the table between them. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The audio features a man speaking in a low, serious, and slightly urgent tone. His voice is calm but carries a sense of gravity as he delivers a message. "The police are on their way now. Brother Cat told me to come and inform you." The camera then cuts to a close-up of the man with the mustache. He looks down, then up, his face illuminated by a cool, blue-toned light. Smoke drifts around him as he continues to speak, his expression serious and focused. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The background is completely dark, isolating the two figures and the table. The shot is static, focusing tightly on the man's face and the smoke. There is no background music or other sound, placing all the focus on the man's direct and important communication.
